1056.issue: [W1056] admin 7.6.17 listed as dependency but 7.6.20 is recommended. Please consider updating globalDependency at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.ws/blob/master/io-package.json).

4036.issue: [S4036] Consider adding .vscode/settings.json file with JSON schema definitions for better development experience with Visual Studio Code.

5042.issue: [W5042] Package "passport" is used in source files but not found in dependencies of [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.ws/blob/master/package.json). Dependency might be missing.

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (src/main.ts). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.ws/blob/master/io-package.json).

5051.issue: [S5051] Custom sleep/wait function(s) found in source files (example/socket-client/tools.d.ts, example/socket-client/tools.js). Consider using the built-in "this.delay()" method provided by the ioBroker adapter base class instead.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#164] "[iobroker-bot] Add CHANGELOG_OLD.md to store older changelog entries"](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.ws/issues/164)

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. Please adapt "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '22' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.ws/blob/master/package.json).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.8.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.ws/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
